content:
I am excited to announce that I have joined Adv. Omkar Pardeshi and Associates for a three-month remote internship, running from July through September 2026. This role is a fantastic opportunity to further bridge the gap between my academic foundation and practical, real-world legal challenges.

I am deeply grateful to Adv. Omkar Pardeshi for this opportunity and look forward to honing my capabilities in legal research, case law analysis, and statutory interpretation. I am eager to refine my skills in legal writing and citation practices by authoring a series of articles, and I am truly looking forward to this new chapter of professional growth.

comment: Remote internships often skew toward research/articles; ensure you also get exposure to drafting filings and feedback on citation accuracy from primary sources.
